failure_signature: Browser CDP connection failed when trying to attach to Chrome instance — browser not launched with remote-debugging-port flag
user_correction: User launched Chrome manually with --remote-debugging-port=9222 before invoking skill
remedy: browser-cdp should check if a debuggable browser instance exists before connecting. If not found, offer to launch one automatically with correct flags.

failure_signature: CDP skill failed to connect because Chrome sandbox environment lacked required dependencies (libx11, libxcomposite) for headless mode
user_correction: Installed missing system packages via apt before running skill
remedy: Skill should detect missing browser dependencies and provide installation instructions, or gracefully degrade to a simpler scraping method.

failure_signature: CDP skill instructions lost during multi-page scraping session — agent forgot pagination handling rules and started re-scraping same pages
user_correction: User broke task into smaller batches of 10 pages each
remedy: Web scraping tasks should be chunked into sub-sessions. Skill should maintain a state file (JSON) tracking progress rather than relying on conversation context.
